content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Pre-market shows mixed signals: Nasdaq strong (+0.89%) lifting IT sentiment, but VIX elevated at 18.46 and crude near $108 on Iran tensions. Heavy Q4 results day (BHEL, AMBUJACEM, EXIDE, ATHER) creates binary risk. Existing book is +0.75% on the day with 8 holdings — focus is portfolio management, not aggressive new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24250
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1032.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD with current SL 1032 (already trailed near breakeven+, +6% unrealized). Q4 results digested bullishly (PAT +19% YoY, GNPA 0.93%). MACD bullish, price at upper Bollinger band, R1 1054.50. Stored SL is exactly at desired level — emitting MODIFY as no-op is wasted; converting to HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 1032 already trails to lock in +5% from entry 984. Target 1110 intact. Day-1 hold, let thesis play out toward R2 1065 / 1110."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge intact with Iran war ongoing, crude $108, INR weak. SL 119 gives ~3.6% downside buffer; target 135 still intact. MACD bearish near term but BB mid-band finding support. Hold as portfolio insurance."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1788.00,
      "new_target": 1845.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1788 is BELOW CMP 1808.30 (gap ~1.1%) — this is a self-stopout risk per trail-gap discipline (need 0.5% buffer minimum which is met but tight). Target 1845 is essentially at 52w high (1849). Keeping SL 1788 (already at +3.1% from entry, locks in gain). No-op MODIFY actually — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 1788 already locks in +3.1%. CMP 1808 vs SL 1788 = 1.1% buffer (tight but acceptable). Near 52w high 1849; Organon deal bullish. Q4 standalone earnings due in May — binary risk approaching. Will reassess as date firms."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 478.50 vs CMP 481.45 = 0.6% gap — already at trail-gap minimum. April production -9.7% YoY is a real concern but summer demand offsets. SL locks in +2% from 469 entry. Target 495 intact (R2 483.40 close). Hold but recognize tight stop will trip on any pullback."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 197.00,
      "new_target": 210.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.5%, day candle 2026-04-29 was massive (186→204, 8.2x volume) — strong Q4 reaction (+68% YoY PAT). Trail SL from 195 to 197 (2% from CMP 199.72 = 197 tight buffer ~1.4%; raising from 195 = 1.5% tighter). Target 210 unchanged. R:R locked. MACD bullish, brokerages upgrading."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.1% with SL 296 (1.2% below CMP 299.55). Concentrated CFO/ED turnover is a red flag, Q4 results May 21 — watch for binary event approach. Crude tailwind supportive. Hold to SL or target. Will exit ahead of May 21 results."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "ETF +1.1%, SL 23.55 vs CMP 23.91 (1.5% buffer). US tariff overhang remains but generics exempt. Pharma sector constructive into May Q4 cluster. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.5% (negligible). SL 915 = 2.4% below CMP 937. Target 985. Q4 was strong (+22% PAT), broker PTs 1000-1100 vs CMP 937 (7-17% upside). Hold; thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results TODAY = binary event. Stock +44% in a month into the print, P/E ~224, Kotak SELL with target 115. Per binary-event discipline: do NOT enter ahead of binary catalyst within 3 sessions. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "AMBUJACEM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.30,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results TODAY = binary event. Q3 PAT collapsed 90.56% YoY, sector oversupply concerns, ACC+Orient amalgamation execution risk. Bearish setup + binary event = skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "INFY",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.35,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Conservative FY27 guidance 1.5-3.5% CC, broker downgrades, MACD bearish, near 52w low. Nasdaq tailwind alone insufficient against weak fundamental setup. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HCLTECH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Goes ex-dividend tomorrow (May 5, Rs 24/share = 2% mechanical adjustment). Plus FY27 guidance 1-4% CC. Avoid pre-ex-date entry — would book a known mechanical loss."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results + buyback + dividend May 6 (in 2 sessions) = binary event. Pre-market +4.72% already discounting much. Per binary-event discipline, no new entry ahead of catalyst within 3 sessions. Watch post-event."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "SYNGENE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.30,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 just released (Apr 29) showed PAT -19% YoY, FY26 PAT -20%, 448bps margin compression on customer concentration. +8.21% pre-market is dead-cat / oversold bounce after -41% TTM. Bearish research, P/E 59.6 still rich. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ELECON",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BSE clarification sought Apr 24 on price movement = governance overhang. Gear Division -21% YoY. Capital goods cluster already represented if I were to add BHEL — but skipping both. Skip per regulatory/governance due diligence rule."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1032 already trails locking +5%. Target 1110."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge, SL 119 intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1788 locks +3.1%. Q4 binary approaching — monitor for date."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 478.50 tight at 0.6% buffer; near 52w high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 197.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail from 195 to 197 after strong Q4 reaction; tight 1.4% buffer reflects post-spike volatility."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 296 intact. Q4 May 21 — will exit before."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 23.55 intact; pharma cluster results approaching."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 915 (2.4% buffer) intact; broker PTs 1000-1100."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BHEL, AMBUJACEM, BAJAJ-AUTO, EXIDE — wait for post-results clarity before assessing. HCLTECH — wait until ex-dividend (May 5) clears. BAJAJ-AUTO post buyback announcement May 6 could be actionable if buyback price >> CMP. SYNGENE — let dust settle, only revisit if H2 commercial biologics catalyst materializes.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 42% deployed, 58% cash — well below 80% soft target but DELIBERATE today: 4 of 15 watchlist names have binary events within 3 sessions (BHEL, AMBUJACEM, BAJAJ-AUTO, EXIDE). VIX 18.46 + Iran/crude tail risk + 16% win rate over rolling 5d argues for conservative posture. The pending GESHIP BUY @ 1542 from prior session is stale — will cancel separately if it remains unfilled. Existing 8 positions are all in green or near-flat at session start (+₹7,493 unrealized); preserving these is priority over adding marginal new entries on a heavy-results day. Will revisit post 11 AM once results start hitting tape."
}
